creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:

Based on https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?query_format=advanced&email1=x11%40FreeBSD.org&emailassigned_to1=1&emailtype1=substring&f1=attachments.ispatch&list_id=621498&o1=equals&v1=1&product=Ports%20%26%20Packages&resolution=---

Disclaimer: As a ports/ committer I have a responsibility to help non-committers but only in unassigned bugs or those assigned to me.
